name: Nicoise Green Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Serve with rice, mashed potatoes, or potato pancakes.
2. Prepare: 35 minutes
3. Heat oil in a frying pan; gently sauté onions and celery until lightly browned.
4. Boil or steam beans until tender (about 10 minutes); drain and set aside.
5. Add tomatoes, vegetable stock, bay leaf, and parsley to the pan. Stir well; simmer for 20 minutes uncovered.
6. Season to taste.
7. Add beans to the sauce and stir well. Bring back to a simmer and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Good source of vitamin A and C. This dish is very delicious.
